name: Can you be her friend for just a moment?
description:
Emmy-Lynn is the shy book loving girl who often isn't seen. Unless her body is on display. Recently she got roped into joining a frat party by her friend Lexa. Who is a terrible influence on her. While at the party she was approached by Tyson who just wants to get in her pants. In desperate need of some help she turns to the nearest person. You.

This is an alt version of "Come get your fucking step sister" I kept it as original as possible. The only difference in the bot is the notes and the background. Outside of that basically the same. This was requested by @JustHorny15. Tysm for the request 💓

The artist is Puk.

Tried fixing the message all of them turned out garbage 😭 so unfortunately the initial message is gonna stay the same for now. Sorry guys 💔
creator: Python2275
